headline: Is It Time To Reconsider Amgen (AMGN) After Its Strong Multi Year Share Price Run?
summary: If you are wondering whether Amgen’s recent share price puts it on sale or at a premium, and what that really means for your money, this article focuses squarely on what you are getting for the price you pay. Amgen’s stock recently closed at US$355.30, with returns of 1.2% over 7 days, 2.2% over 30 days, 8.4% year to date, 32.2% over 1 year, 60.1% over 3 years, and 61.7% over 5 years. These figures set the scene for a closer look at whether the valuation still stacks up. Recent attention on...

headline: Zai Lab (ZLAB), Amgen (AMGN) Partner to Evaluate Combination Lung Cancer Therapy
summary: Zai Lab Limited (NASDAQ:ZLAB) is one of the 10 Overlooked Growth Stocks to Buy Now. Zai Lab Limited (NASDAQ:ZLAB) is one of the overlooked growth stocks to buy now. On April 1, Zai Lab and Amgen (NASDAQ:AMGN) entered into a global clinical trial collaboration to evaluate a combination therapy for extensive-stage small cell lung cancer/ES-SCLC. […]
